name: Field Note Civic Labs
summary: Field Note helps people and small organizations turn scattered records, paperwork, and working knowledge into practical AI-ready workflows.
audience: people handling document-heavy administration, intake, review, evidence, policies, public records, or internal working knowledge

services.name: Two-hour working session
services.description: Map the records, workflow, decision points, risks, and one realistic next step.

services.name: AI-ready record cleanup
services.description: Structure files, emails, PDFs, spreadsheets, notes, and decisions so they can be searched, reviewed, and reused.

services.name: Workflow design
services.description: Trace how information moves through real work and identify where it gets delayed, repeated, or hard to verify.

services.name: Practical AI use review
services.description: Identify where AI can help with search, summary, comparison, intake, drafting, or review while keeping human decision points visible.

services.name: Lightweight internal tools
services.description: Small working tools, automations, summaries, indexes, and knowledge bases that prove whether a bigger system is worth building.

fieldNotes.name: HR Working Knowledge Tool
fieldNotes.description: Disorganized HR material converted into an AI-friendly working environment for a real task.

fieldNotes.name: Civic Records Monitor
fieldNotes.description: Public permit and civic records shaped into a local briefing workflow with filtering, summaries, and links back to official sources.

fieldNotes.name: Evidence and Paperwork Assistant
fieldNotes.description: Documents, emails, notes, timelines, and exhibits organized for review, search, source mapping, and drafting support.

fieldNotes.name: Financial Statement Workflow
fieldNotes.description: Statement PDFs and category records processed into a cleaner review workflow for reconciliation, categorization, and future reuse.

fieldNotes.name: Document Intake and Sorting
fieldNotes.description: Workflow tests that watch incoming files, classify material, route documents to review folders, and log what changed.

boundaries: Field Note Civic Labs does not provide legal advice.
AI should support human review and should not hide the basis for important decisions.
